scripts.check: node --experimental-vm-modules -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const vm=require('vm');const dir=path.join(process.cwd(),'assets/js');for(const file of fs.readdirSync(dir)){if(!file.endsWith('.js'))continue;new vm.SourceTextModule(fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,file),'utf8'),{identifier:file});console.log('Parsed',file);}"
